notes: Collected 2026-06-12 by locator agent. Consumer brand domain is dentalandbraces.com (alldentalbraces.com refused connections). location-sitemap.xml lists exactly 12 per-office pages; every address fetched from the canonical per-office page. uniteddentalpartners.com/locations/ confirms the same 12 offices plus additional affiliated brands (Advanced Family Dental, All About Kids Dental Care, Children's Dental Center, Every Tooth Counts, First Smiles Dental, River Trail Orthodontics, Smiles for Families, Smiles for Kids, Smiles Pediatric Dentistry, Westgate Implant & Oral Surgery, Wheatland Dental). UDP 'Our Story' states 22 offices total across all brands. No PE sponsor disclosed on any fetched page.
